layer1_absolute_prohibition.title: Arms and explosives
layer1_absolute_prohibition.message: This product is prohibited for export from Malaysia under absolute prohibition.

layer1_absolute_prohibition.title: Narcotics and controlled drugs
layer1_absolute_prohibition.message: This product is prohibited for export from Malaysia under absolute prohibition.

layer2_license_required.title: Strategic or dual-use items
layer2_license_required.message: Export licence may be required before shipment.

layer2_license_required.title: Telecommunications equipment
layer2_license_required.message: Controlled item likely needs regulator approval.

layer3_conditional.title: Animals and animal products
layer3_conditional.message: Animal-related exports usually require permit and inspection.

layer3_conditional.title: Plants and plant products
layer3_conditional.message: Plant-related exports usually require phytosanitary controls.

layer3_conditional.title: Food and processed consumables
layer3_conditional.message: Food products may require certification and inspection.

layer3_conditional.title: Wildlife and protected species
layer3_conditional.message: Wildlife-related products require strict permit controls.

sea_logistics_flow: Prepare commercial invoice and packing list
Await Customs risk review and release
Issue draft bill of lading instructions to forwarder
Final customs clearance and vessel departure

CN.notes: Check current China customs prohibitions and product-specific registration requirements.
